name: bandit.mixed_signal_reload_resume_mcw
description: Challenge C for CAOL-MULTI-CAMP-SIGNAL-GAUNTLET-v0: no-fixture reload/resume audit for the currently saved McWilliams dev-harness world produced by the green mixed-signal coexistence run. It starts the saved world without reinstalling a fixture, verifies the active live-signal scout and active structural scavenge groups are still present, advances a bounded 5-minute wait, saves, and verifies the same active groups/sites did not disappear, duplicate, or stale out.

steps.label: post_reload_mixed_signal_world_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the already-saved McWilliams dev-harness world reloads without fixture reinstall before active outing metadata is audited
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after no-fixture reload, this run is only saved-file inspection and cannot be credited as reload support.

steps.label: audit_reloaded_live_signal_scout_before_resume_wait
steps.abort_reason: after no-fixture reload, saved bandit_live_world metadata lost or duplicated the active live-signal scout group

steps.label: audit_reloaded_structural_scavenge_before_resume_wait
steps.abort_reason: after no-fixture reload, saved bandit_live_world metadata lost or duplicated the active structural scavenge group

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_before_reload_resume_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player turn baseline is recorded before the reload/resume bounded wait

steps.label: wait_5_minutes_after_reload_for_active_outing_resume
steps.expected_visible_fact: after no-fixture reload, a real bounded 5-minute wait runs with the same two active outing classes visible in live-world perf artifacts
steps.failure_rule: If active group state vanishes or duplicates during the reload/resume wait, Challenge C is yellow/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_reload_resume_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the reload/resume wait

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_reload_resume_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after reload/resume wait

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_after_reload_resume_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved turn did not advance by at least five minutes after reload/resume wait/save

steps.label: audit_live_signal_scout_after_reload_resume_wait
steps.abort_reason: after reload/resume wait/save, the live-signal scout active group disappeared, duplicated, or lost its target/mark

steps.label: audit_structural_scavenge_after_reload_resume_wait
steps.abort_reason: after reload/resume wait/save, the structural scavenge active group disappeared, duplicated, or lost its active lead

steps.label: audit_reload_resume_artifact
steps.abort_reason: reload/resume artifact did not show clean no-fixture load plus continuing active outing perf state

evidence_contract.claim: paired with the green mixed-signal create/save run, a no-fixture reload preserves one live-signal scout group and one structural scavenge group, then a bounded wait/save keeps both active groups stable without disappearance, duplication, or stale target loss
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: reload support only / inconclusive without paired create-save run and bounded wait
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No Challenge C credit if a fixture is reinstalled, startup/load is not green, active groups are absent before wait, wait ledger is not green, saved turn does not advance, or active group/site metadata fails after resume wait/save.
